title: × Anteriocamptis lesbiensis
intro: There is not enough information available about the plant × Anteriocamptis lesbiensis.
taxonomy: I couldn't find any information on the classification of × Anteriocamptis lesbiensis. However, based on its name, it appears to be a hybrid species within the family Nematodea and possibly the subfamily Camptidae. The × symbol indicates that it is a hybrid species. The name lesbiensis suggests that the species is endemic to the Greek island of Lesbos. Further research is needed to confirm its classification.
